properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Healing rain is coming down It’s coming nearer to this old town Rich and poor, weak and strong It’s bringing mercy; it won’t be long.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Healing rain is coming down It’s coming closer to the lost and found Tears of joy and tears of shame Are washed forever in Jesus’ name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Healing rain, it comes with fire So let it fall and take us higher The healing rain I’m not afraid To be washed in heaven’s rain.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lift your heads, let us return To the mercy seat where time began And in your eyes I see the pain Come soak this dry heart with healing rain

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And only You, the Son of Man Can take a leper and let him stand So lift your hands, they can be held By someone greater, the great I AM.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Healing rain is falling down Healing rain is falling down I’m not afraid I’m not afraid
